name: Spider Nest
description: Thick webs choke the hollow between the trees, glistening with venom in the pale light. Giant spiders scuttle across their silken domain, each the size of a hunting hound. At the centre of the nest, something ancient and bloated shifts in the shadows.
failureConsequence: Venom courses through your veins as the spiders bind you in silk. You barely cut free before the paralysis takes hold, but the poison lingers for days.
